The men’s pole vault at the2024 Paris Olympic Gamesprovided a world record and a moment between champion Armand Duplantis of Sweden and his family that allowed viewers to become invested in their deep history in the sport.

Will the women’s final come with such an emotional bonus? We’ll find out Wednesday.

Will the men’s discus be as historic as Team USA’s Valarie Allman becoming the second woman in history to win back-to-back discus titles? We’ll find out Wednesday.

The track and field competition began Aug. 1 and will end Aug. 11.The first half already has provided some unforgettable moments.

The men’s 400-meter event also will be concluding during Wednesday’s coverage from Stade de France in Paris, and that’s sure to keep viewers on the edges of their seats for another breathtaking 45 seconds.

Add in the semifinals of the men’s 110-meter hurdles, men’s 400-meter hurdles, men’s 200-meter dash and the women’s 400, plus the final of the men’s 3,000-meter steeplechase, and there won’t be a dull moment – whether you’re up late to catch the beginning of the action or spending your afternoon glued to the TV – or both.

Here’s the schedule for Day 7 of the track and field competition at the 2024 Summer Olympics:

All Times Eastern

The final of the men’s pole vault at the 2024 Summer Olympics in Paris was filled with history and emotion.

Simply enough, the men set the bar pretty high for the women, who will compete for their medals Wednesday at 1 p.m. Eastern.

Everyone's talking about the men's pole vault final last night. It had everything:A new World Record ✅Supportive competitors ✅Bleeding hands ✅A romantic kiss ✅Did you watch?#Paris2024#Olympics#OMEGA#OMEGAOfficialTimekeeper@WorldAthleticspic.twitter.com/KgWgmpyLnh

The Olympics are on the NBC family of networks, including the Peacock streaming app.

All track and field events will be broadcast live on Peacock, but additional coverage will be provided as follows (all times Eastern):

FloTrack is on the ground in Paris with the latest news. Get the latest news and notes and vibes from Paris on FloTrack.

Don't miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.

description: The track and field competition at the 2024 Olympics in Paris began Aug. 1. Here's what to know about the schedule for Aug. 7.
